properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Message came in this last age to prepare a Bride, To walk with Him and talk with Him and in His Word abide. It’s written in the Spoken Word, and it’s laying there, To bring us into Rapturing Grace and take us out of here.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Overcoming Power is what we have today, Overcoming Power to keep the devil away; Overcoming Power till we become the Word. That’s when we’ll leave this sinful earth And go and meet the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We have passed the seventh age, The power has to come. The scientists have gone to work, They’re sure to get the job done. Our sins and weights to lay aside, And we’ll set everything right; So when the inspiration falls we’ll just take off in flight.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Our Moses has already gone, He has prepared the way, He brought us to the Jordan, And he was taken away; But Joshua is preparing now to sound out His command, To gather all the saints of God to enter the Promise Land.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This day will I begin to magnify Thee In the people's sight You and were eye witnesses At Mc Allister street that night Also in the hospital We had witnesses there By inspiration, "In seven days time, You'ok be walking out of here."
